title: xyris graomogolensis
intro: Xyris graomogolensis, also known as the Graomogol xyris or Graomogol yellow-eyed grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine in Indonesia, where it is believed to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Xyris graomogolensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Xyris graomogolensis are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
